title: Blank Cards with Envelopes - 48 Floral Blank Note Cards with Envelopes – 4 Assorted Cards for All Occasions! Blank Notecards Stationary Set for Happy Mothers Day Cards-4x5.5"
features: THE PERSONAL TOUCH: Over the next year you’ll need birthday cards, encouragement cards, sympathy cards, graduation cards, thinking of you cards… maybe even some “just because” cards! So, you’ll love saving time card shopping by having this boxed set on hand. And they’re the only cards you’ve seen in this unique design today! As unique and special as your personal message.

LUXURY CARDSTOCK: Beautiful notecards need beautiful stationery. Our 4” x 5.5” cards are printed on thick 300gsm glossy card stock with 120gsm envelopes in four different colors! The cards’ interior is blank, matte white and non-bleed, so you can write with any pen! And these are blank greeting cards with a lovely box, so your cards are always kept clean, tidy and safe.

UNIQUE DESIGN: Sure, they’re the sturdiest cards on Amazon; they may also be the most stylish. Your set contains 48 all occasion cards in four different watercolor floral designs with 4 different colored envelopes suited to each card. This is the only set of this kind on Amazon.

WE KNOW CARDS: Thanks to their smooth writing surface and tasteful design, our original pink thank you cards have been popular for years. Now we bring you Sweetzer & Orange blank notecards with envelopes. In addition to this all-occasion assortment, see our recently released sympathy cards, advice cards, memorial cards, and sympathy acknowledgement cards. From celebration to commiseration, personalize each occasion in YOUR words.

12-MONTH GUARANTEE: If you’ve ever seen a flimsy, smudged card yourself, you can be certain the sentiment gets a bit lost in the quality. Let your personal authentic message truly flourish with a hello, bon voyage, happy birthday or thank you they’ll treasure. Sweetzer & Orange Greeting Cards for Every Occasion also come with a 12-Month Guarantee.
